Interface ITransform

All Known Implementing Classes:
Transform
public interface ITransform
Interface do Transform.

  • Method Details

    • move

      void move(Point dPos, int dlayer)
      Move this ITransform by dPos.x(), dPos.y() and dlayer
      Parameters:
      dPos - the 2D differential to move
      dlayer - the layer differential

    • setPosition

      void setPosition(Point pos, int layer)

    • rotate

      void rotate(double dTheta)
      Rotate this ITransform from current orientation by dTheta
      Parameters:
      dTheta - pos: 0 invalid input: '<'= this.angle() invalid input: '<' 360

    • scale

      void scale(double dScale)
      increment the ITransform scale by dscale
      Parameters:
      dScale - the scale increment

    • setDirection

      void setDirection(int i)

      Point position()
      Returns:
      the (x,y) coordinates

    • scale

      Returns:
      the current scale factor
